title: BatchedMesh perf path + shadows-bench shadow deep-dive

Counts explicit `Batchable` annotations and `enabled: false` opt-outs.

stories.title: **M17-batched-mesh-primary** ‚úÖ ‚Äî BatchedMesh adapter path: `perObjectFrustumCulled = true` explicit, geometries get `computeBoundingBox()` +‚Ä¶
stories.summary: **M17-batched-mesh-primary** ‚úÖ ‚Äî BatchedMesh adapter path: `perObjectFrustumCulled = true` explicit, geometries get `computeBoundingBox()` + `computeBoundingSphere()` on add, new `setBatchedInstanceColor` for per-instance colour parity. `BatchingOptions.defaultPath` plumbed through `RuntimeOptions.batchingPath` ‚Üê `project.json#render.batching.path`. Doctor surfaces `path=...`.

stories.title: **M17-batched-colour-squaring fix** ‚úÖ ‚Äî bucket key + material colour both carried `renderer.color` so per-instance √ó material colour squared‚Ä¶
stories.summary: **M17-batched-colour-squaring fix** ‚úÖ ‚Äî bucket key + material colour both carried `renderer.color` so per-instance √ó material colour squared ‚Üí darker scene. Fix mirrors S50: drop colour from key, anchor material at white.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **M17-batched-vs-instanced measurement** ‚úÖ ‚Äî wrote `scripts/perf-probe-batching.mjs` (Playwright A/B, patches project.json, reloads, samples‚Ä¶
stories.summary: **M17-batched-vs-instanced measurement** ‚úÖ ‚Äî wrote `scripts/perf-probe-batching.mjs` (Playwright A/B, patches project.json, reloads, samples for N seconds, restores on SIGINT). shadows-bench result: `batched` saves 36 % draw calls + 17.9 % triangles via per-instance culling, but `renderMs` rises +63.5 % (multi-draw command overhead on small scene with most instances in view). Decision: shadows-bench reverts to `instanced`; `batched` plumbing stays. Findings: `docs/research/m17-batched-vs-instanced-shadows-bench.md`.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **SHADOWS-bench-perf-deepdive** ‚úÖ ‚Äî wrote `scripts/perf-probe-shadows.mjs` (sister probe, fresh browser per scenario so PCSS's one-way‚Ä¶
stories.summary: **SHADOWS-bench-perf-deepdive** ‚úÖ ‚Äî wrote `scripts/perf-probe-shadows.mjs` (sister probe, fresh browser per scenario so PCSS's one-way substitution can't leak). 6 scenarios measured. Findings: cascade count is the dominant lever (3 ‚Üí 2 = ‚àí17.1 % renderMs); PCSS cost only +6.5 % (smaller than expected); shadowMapSize 1024 ‚Üí 512 just ‚àí3.8 % in software-WebGL; programs counter flat (no shader churn). Combined `pcf + 2c + 512` saves 15.2 % renderMs at moderate visual cost. shadows-bench config left as-is (visual decision). Three follow-ups filed: `M21-shadow-static-caster-tag` (main perf win), `M21-shadow-map-size-real-hw`, `M21-fxaa-cost-isolation`. Notes: `docs/research/m21-shadows-bench-perf.md`.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **shadow autoUpdate hotfix** ‚úÖ ‚Äî `examples/shadows-bench/project.json` dropped `shadows.autoUpdate: false`.
stories.summary: The flag was left from the previously-static scene; after S48 added moving cars + swaying trees the per-frame shadow map needed to refresh.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **e2e fix at sprint close** ‚úÖ ‚Äî hello-3d smoke assertion `info.meshes > 0` failed under auto-batch (everything in buckets, `meshes` reads 0).
stories.summary: Sum `meshes + bucketInstances + batchedBucketInstances` so either path counts.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

followUps: `M21-shadow-static-caster-tag` (Sprint 52, highest-impact perf follow-up ‚Äî tagged dynamic vs static casters, restore `autoUpdate=false` for ~290 static entities while keeping cars + swaying trees correct).
`M21-shadow-map-size-real-hw` ‚Äî user-driven measurement, software-WebGL undersells fill-rate savings.
`M17-bvh-extension` ‚Äî `@three.ez/batched-mesh-extensions` may flip the `batched` crossover toward smaller scenes; own sprint when prioritised.
shadows-bench picture got dimmer after S51's autoUpdate/bias changes ‚Äî picked up as `POLISH-shadows-bench-*` in Sprint 52.
notes: Deliverables: `engine/render/three-render-adapter.ts` ‚Äî BatchedMesh: `perObjectFrustumCulled = true`, geometry bounding-box compute on add, `setBatchedInstanceColor`, material anchored at white.; `engine/render/systems/batching-system.ts` ‚Äî `BatchingOptions.defaultPath`, per-instance colour stamping in batched path, bucket key drops `renderer.color`.; `engine/runtime/start.ts` ‚Äî `RuntimeOptions.batchingPath` plumbing.; `engine/tools/doctor/project-doctor.ts` ‚Äî new `Batching:` section + `formatBatching` helper + `BatchingConfigReport` type.; `schemas/project.schema.json` ‚Äî `render.batching.path: "instanced" | "batched"` declared.; `src/app.ts` ‚Äî project.json `render.batching.path` ‚Üí `runtimeOptions.batchingPath`.; `examples/shadows-bench/project.json` ‚Äî dropped `shadows.autoUpdate: false`; kept `batching.auto: true`, path stays default (instanced).; `tests/e2e/app.spec.ts` ‚Äî sums bucket instances when asserting "rendered something".; `tests/unit/doctor-batching.test.ts` (new) ‚Äî 4 cases.; `tests/unit/batching-system-batched-path.test.ts` (new) ‚Äî 4 cases incl. colour-squaring regression.; `scripts/perf-probe-batching.mjs` (new) ‚Äî reusable instanced ‚Üî batched A/B.; `scripts/perf-probe-shadows.mjs` (new) ‚Äî reusable named-scenario shadow probe.; `docs/research/m17-batched-vs-instanced-shadows-bench.md` (new) ‚Äî A/B numbers + crossover analysis.; `docs/research/m21-shadows-bench-perf.md` (new) ‚Äî 6-scenario deep-dive + follow-up story list.; `docs/agent/build-a-game.md` ‚Äî "Cut draw calls with auto-batch" recipe.

Verification: `npm run typecheck` ‚úÖ; `npm run test` ‚úÖ ‚Äî 71 files / 440+ tests (incl. 8 new batching-doctor + batched-path cases).; `npm run preflight` ‚úÖ at sprint close ‚Äî 11/11 e2e smoke green after the `meshes`-counter fix.; `npm run engine:doctor -- examples/{shadows-bench, beacon-world}` ‚úÖ ‚Äî prints new `Batching:` section correctly.; `node scripts/perf-probe-batching.mjs` ‚úÖ ‚Äî A/B numbers reproducible.; `node scripts/perf-probe-shadows.mjs --durationMs 4000` ‚úÖ ‚Äî 6 scenarios reproducible.; Merged via PR [#54](https://github.com/MaxMinsk/AGF/pull/54).
